prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025年理科最低位次约3397→5213→3949，2024年出现明显后移（较2023年下降约1816名），2025年有所回升（较2024年前移约1264名），近3年波动较大；2 025年基准约3949名；本省理科计划2023–2024年均为66人，2025年缩减至52人，2026年计划49人，较2025年继续缩招约5.8%，招生名额减少理论上使竞争 略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜约第84名，近年排名稳定在75–84区间，属全国中上游水平；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆 情或投档断档记录；抖音平台关注度一般，未进入热度排名前列；电气工程（A）、动力工程及工程热物理（A-），均为国家级重点学科，与该校电力行业特色 高度契合，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化专业社会热度高热推荐，能源动力类专业推荐偏热，计算机/电子信息类持续偏热；本省2 026年考生总数约23.8万人，；该校位于河北省保定市，非本省高校，在新疆招生占比极小（2023–2024年均为9人，占全国总招生约1.2%–1.9%），跨省报考受地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3949名、2026年计划继续缩招5.8%（缓解竞争）、本省考生大幅增加（加剧竞争）及电气专业高热吸引等多重因素，缩招的缓解效应不足以抵消 考生激增和热门专业吸引带来的竞争压力，预计2026年理科最低位次；预测最低位次约3862名，区间3362–4362名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science was approximately 3397 → 5213 → 3949. In 2024, there was a significant backward shift (a drop of about 1816 places compared to 2023), and in 2025, it rebounded somewhat (an advance of about 1264 places compared to 2024), showing considerable fluctuation over the past three years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 3949th place. The provincial Science enrollment plan was 66 students in both 2023 and 2024, reduced to 52 in 2025, and the 2026 plan is 49 students, a further reduction of about 5.8% compared to 2025. The reduction in enrollment slots theoretically eases competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. It ranks approximately 84th on the Soft Science main list, with stable rankings in the 75–84 range in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier nationally. Its reputation has been stable recently, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps reported. Its presence on Douyin (TikTok) is moderate, not ranking among the top in popularity. Electrical Engineering (A) and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics (A-) are both national key disciplines, highly aligned with the university's power industry characteristics, providing strong appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Electrical Engineering and Automation major is highly popular and recommended, Energy and Power Engineering majors are moderately popular, and Computer/Electronic Information majors remain consistently popular. The province's total number of examinees in 2026 is approximately 238,000. The university is located in Baoding, Hebei Province, not within the province, and its enrollment share in Xinjiang is very small (9 students in both 2023 and 2024, accounting for about 1.2%–1.9% of total national enrollment), so cross-provincial application is limited by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3949, the 2026 plan to further reduce enrollment by 5.8% (easing competition), a significant increase in provincial examinees (intensifying competition), and the high appeal of Electrical Engineering majors, the mitigating effect of enrollment reduction is insufficient to offset the competitive pressure from the surge in examinees and popular major attraction. The predicted minimum ranking for Science in 2026 is approximately 3862, with a range of 3362–4362.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3362–4362, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (such as Electrical Engineering and Automation) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 3362), prioritize aiming for Tier 1 Electrical Engineering flagship majors. If the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 4362), focus on Tier 3 safety options and be cautious with Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 1326 → 1324 → 1501. It remained basically stable from 2023 to 2024, but significantly shifted backward by about 177 places in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 175 places over the past two years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 1501. The provincial liberal arts enrollment plan was 4 in 2023, 5 in 2024, 4 in 2025, and 4 in 2026. In recent years, the planned number has fluctuated slightly between 4 and 5, with 2026 remaining the same as 2025, having a limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 84th on the Soft Science main ranking, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. Although liberal arts are not the university's strong direction, the 211 level still has strong appeal for liberal arts candidates. In recent years, its reputation has been stable, with no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment gaps. Attention on the Douyin platform is average. The university's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in engineering fields such as Electrical Engineering (A) and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics (A-). The liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, Public Administration, Social Work) have no corresponding A-class discipline evaluations, so disciplinary support is relatively limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a relatively high social popularity recommendation, while Public Administration and Social Work have average popularity. In 2026, the total number of candidates in this province is approximately 238,000 (including uncertain marks). The university is located in Baoding City, Hebei Province, not a local university. With only 4 liberal arts enrollment spots in Xinjiang, cross-provincial applications are limited by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1501, the 2026 enrollment plan remaining unchanged, a significant increase in local candidates (intensifying competition), and the average popularity of liberal arts majors, the competitive pressure from the surge in candidates is the main upward driver. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking for liberal arts is approximately 1531, with a range of 1255 to 1807.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Liberal arts enrollment has only 3 majors and a plan of only 4 spots, offering limited choices. If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 1255–1807, it is recommended to use Law as a Tier 1 sprint, Public Administration as the Tier 2 main choice, and Social Work as a Tier 3 safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1255), you can focus on sprinting for the Law major.
